name: DEX Swap
description: Token swaps and trade execution on decentralized exchanges (Uniswap, 0x, Aerodrome, Jupiter, etc.). Same-chain spot swaps.

name: Perpetual Futures
description: Open, close, and manage perpetual futures positions on Hyperliquid, GMX, dYdX, and similar perp DEXs.

name: Wallet Intelligence
description: Wallet behavior analysis, transaction history, holder profiling, on-chain risk scoring, behavior flags, counterparty analysis.

name: Token Risk Detection
description: Rugpull detection, honeypot detection, contract safety verification, scam detection, malicious token flagging.

name: Yield Analysis
description: Yield farming, staking returns, lending rates, liquid staking, APY tracking, yield optimization.

name: Technical Analysis
description: Chart analysis, technical indicators, AI-powered trade suggestions, signals, multi-timeframe analysis, sentiment.

name: Portfolio Management
description: Portfolio tracking, balance summaries, P&L reporting, asset allocation across multiple wallets.

name: Market Data
description: Token prices, market cap, trending assets, liquidity, volume, OHLC data, ecosystem-wide metrics.

name: NFT Analytics
description: NFT collection analysis, floor prices, rarity ranking, holder data, mint activity.

name: Bridging
description: Cross-chain asset bridges and transfers between L1s and L2s, bridge route optimization.

name: DCA and Limit Orders
description: Dollar-cost averaging strategies, limit orders, scheduled trades, automated recurring buys.

name: Memecoin Discovery
description: Memecoin discovery, launchpad analysis, viral token tracking, early-stage token detection.

name: Strategy Backtesting
description: Backtest trading strategies on historical data, performance simulation, returns analysis.

name: Whale Tracking
description: Track large wallets, whale alerts, on-chain whale activity monitoring, smart-money following.

name: Stablecoin Analytics
description: Stablecoin reserve analysis, peg monitoring, depeg risk assessment, supply tracking.

name: Smart Contract Audit
description: Smart contract analysis, vulnerability scanning, audit reports, code-level security review.

name: Liquidity and AMM
description: Liquidity pool analysis, AMM dynamics, LP position management, impermanent loss.

name: Alerts and Monitoring
description: On-chain event alerts, price alerts, transaction notifications, webhook delivery.

name: Trading Bots
description: Automated trading agents, copy trading, MEV-protected execution, order routing.

name: Research and Discovery
description: Token research, project due diligence, market research, alpha discovery, ecosystem reports.
